# release-tools.txt — hash-pinned lockfile for the PyPI build stage
#
# Consumed by .github/pipelines/esrp-publish.yml as:
#   python -m pip install --require-hashes --no-deps -r release-tools.txt
#
# --require-hashes verifies every wheel/sdist matches one of the SHA-256s
# below; --no-deps prevents pip from quietly resolving extra transitives
# that this lockfile would not cover. To regenerate (after editing
# release-tools.in):
#
#   pip install pip-tools==7.4.1
#   pip-compile --allow-unsafe --generate-hashes --resolver=backtracking \
#     --output-file .github/pipelines/release-tools/release-tools.txt \
#     .github/pipelines/release-tools/release-tools.in
#
# Commit the regenerated file together with the input change.
##

# by the following command:
#
#    pip-compile --allow-unsafe --generate-hashes --output-file=.github/pipelines/release-tools/release-tools.txt .github/pipelines/release-tools/release-tools.in
#
